## Quality Bar

- [ ] Each new check answers: "Would this prevent a real bug, security vulnerability, or production incident?"
- [ ] Code examples are syntactically correct and follow the pattern shown
- [ ] Check follows the `- [ ] **Bold title** — Description` format
- [ ] If adding to a Part file, the corresponding section in `checklist.md` is also updated
